subject: Postsecondary Acceptance
content:
Congratulations %player%,

We are happy to inform you that you have been accepted into our institution!

Registration for Fall classes will open in the summer. You will receive more information about your first year, and orientation via email in the next few weeks.

For any questions or concerns, feel free to reach out to our administration team.

We look forward to having you as part of our upcoming year!

Kind regards,

Amir Mohammed
Admissions Office
AMohammed@PSU.ca
Administration Building, Unit 2
